title: DzighLite
description: A modified of Vanilla 64x PBR Vanilla's resource pack that aims to express fancy and realistic look of Minecraft. This pack can use Fabric, Optifine, or Iris.
body:
### ## # **Features**
This resources pack is still in development progress (Beta), right now focusing on major blocks.

**The aim of the development:**
Easy to apply latest minecraft versions 1.21.4 
can use using Complementary Unbound, Seus PTGI E12 shader packs
Good appearance with minimal performance impact with 64 pixel format
Unique texture

Feel free to give suggestion for the development of this pack. I am using this pack for Minecraft building. You can do that as well to enhance your building material look more fancy. 

This DzighLite pack:
incorporating PBR format (Reflections, Normal maps, Height maps)
64x Resolution, use vanilla's as starting reference.
Several blocks are applied textures and some have low res PBR

Wait for the future updates such as item an foliage.
Add textures for all blocks and items
Apply to latest minecraft versions

**Requirements**
Using Shaders with PBR already prefered to give maximum result. (I am using Complementary Unbound or Seus PTGI shaders)

**Terms**
You can:
Upload in-game videos or screenshots on any media. Adding the name of this resources pack and its download link in the description is highly appreciated.
Modify files only for personal use.

**You cannot:**

Redistribute this pack regardless of whether files are edited or not.
Claim this pack as your own.
Use my work for commercial purposes.
Upload a work that include the assets of this pack.

Thank you all, have a fun Minecraft game!

#See my [Patreon](https://patreon.com/BradDzigh) for the PREMIUM 256x Resources Pack
